scripts.db:backup: sh -c 'DB_PATH="${LA_CITADEL_DATABASE_PATH:-${DATABASE_PATH:-}}"; if [ -z "$DB_PATH" ]; then if [ -f la-citadel.db ]; then DB_PATH=la-citadel.db; elif [ -f mission-control.db ]; then DB_PATH=mission-control.db; else DB_PATH=la-citadel.db; fi; fi; sqlite3 "$DB_PATH" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" && cp "$DB_PATH" "$DB_PATH.backup" && printf "Backed up to %s\n" "$DB_PATH.backup"'
scripts.db:restore: sh -c 'DB_PATH="${LA_CITADEL_DATABASE_PATH:-${DATABASE_PATH:-}}"; if [ -z "$DB_PATH" ]; then if [ -f la-citadel.db ]; then DB_PATH=la-citadel.db; elif [ -f mission-control.db ]; then DB_PATH=mission-control.db; else DB_PATH=la-citadel.db; fi; fi; cp "$DB_PATH.backup" "$DB_PATH" && printf "Restored from %s\n" "$DB_PATH.backup"'
scripts.db:reset: sh -c 'DB_PATH="${LA_CITADEL_DATABASE_PATH:-${DATABASE_PATH:-}}"; if [ -z "$DB_PATH" ]; then if [ -f la-citadel.db ]; then DB_PATH=la-citadel.db; elif [ -f mission-control.db ]; then DB_PATH=mission-control.db; else DB_PATH=la-citadel.db; fi; fi; rm -f "$DB_PATH" "$DB_PATH"-* && npm run db:seed'
